name: A 15-minute Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Boneless, lean meat (pork, Loin, or beef such as flank steak, round steak, or top sirloin)
1 lb (or 2 cups) Fresh or frozen vegetables (Bird's Eye Farm Fresh Mixture, chopped into bite-size pieces or thin strips)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine marinade ingredients in a bowl. Add meat pieces and toss to coat well. Let stand for 10 minutes; then drain extra marinade from the meat.
2. Cool a wok or heavy pan with non-stick cooking spray. Add 1 tablespoon oil and heat on high.
3. Add meat and cook until browned, stirring constantly. Add vegetables and sauce. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer until the vegetables are tender but still crisp.
Yield: 4 servings
